execution_boundary.summary: Risk-management controls inform execution review but do not directly emit runtime verdicts.

preparation_boundary.summary: Risk management applies before deployment or execution, including preparation states.

commitment_boundary.summary: Governance lifecycle controls can support commit-time review when mapped to policy evidence.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Risk categories require translation into benchmark-equivalent action paths.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown risks should route to measurement, management, and fail-closed policy where applicable.

authority_boundary.summary: Risk framework guidance does not grant StegVerse execution authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Risk posture depends on current evidence and lifecycle context.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Risk management artifacts can aid reconstruction if preserved with source and scope.

interoperability_path.summary: NIST AI RMF maps into policy, evidence, and lifecycle review dimensions.

next_required_action: add NIST AI RMF control-mapping fixture for evidence freshness and lifecycle review
